falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes below the 200-day moving average with a single-day trading volume exceeding 50% of the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed breakdown below key support, contradicting the pattern's implied bullish reversal and invalidating the 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern similarity score drops below 60% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant degradation in pattern similarity would indicate the current market behavior no longer aligns with the historical bottom pattern, directly invalidating the 82% similarity-based analysis.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A rise in blowoff pressure would contradict the current 40 score and suggest accelerating bearish momentum, disproving the 'HOLD' verdict's implication of a potential bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
